description.value: Create wall of fire at medium range up to 60 feet long, 20 feet high, 1 foot thick (or ring 20 feet diameter). One side deals [[/damage 16 type=fire]] damage to creatures within 10 feet (choose side when casting). Passing through wall deals +8 (24) fire damage. Provides total cover.

system.range: Medium, 60 ft. (60 feet long, 20 feet high OR ring 20 feet diameter)
system.weavingRoll: Fire Potential + Fire Mastery / Space Potential + Space Mastery
